Reason_for_Visit.summary: Metastatic breast cancer, follow-up visit to review April 2021 PETCT scan results, discuss starting Doxil on 07/01/2021, and evaluate hip pain.

Clinical_Findings.findings: Numerous FDG avid hepatic metastases have increased in size and FDG uptake when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021. Numerous FDG avid skeletal metastases throughout the skeleton have increased in FDG uptake and number when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021. Focal region of apparent increased FDG uptake in the visualized portion of the right frontal lobe, incompletely characterized on this study, which could potentially be an intracranial metastasis. Prominent intraluminal uptake in the anorectal region, nonspecific, potentially physiologic or inflammatory in etiology. An underlying polyp would not be excluded.

Treatment_Changes.recent_changes: Patient not taking LORazepam, ondansetron, oxyCODONE, and prochlorperazine.

Treatment_Goals.goals_of_treatment: Not yet on treatment — no intent to assess.
Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
Treatment_Goals.current_meds: ascorbic acid, vitamin C, cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, LORazepam, magnesium, medical cannabis, ondansetron, oxyCODONE, prochlorperazine

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: Progression of metastatic disease when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021. Numerous FDG avid hepatic metastases have increased in size and FDG uptake when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021. Numerous FDG avid skeletal metastases throughout the skeleton have increased in FDG uptake and number when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021.
